summary: Comprehensive testing of AI Financial Plan Generator and AI Meeting Summary Generator features complete. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Both killer features working correctly: 1) AI Financial Plan Generator creates comprehensive plans with Executive Summary, Retirement Plan, Investment Strategy, Tax Strategy, Insurance Gaps, Action Plan, and Plan Metrics. 2) AI Meeting Summary Generator creates summaries with Executive Summary, Topics Covered, Decisions Made, Action Items (with assignee, due date, priority, status), Plan Updates Required, and Next Meeting recommendations. Dashboard 3-Engine System verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal appears on every page load and requires checkbox + button click to dismiss. May need localStorage persistence to remember user acceptance.

AI Financial Plan Generator - Insurance Gaps with income_protection_needed, life_insurance_gap, tpd_coverage_needed, recommendations
AI Financial Plan Generator - Action Plan with immediate_actions, short_term_actions, long_term_actions
AI Financial Plan Generator - Plan Metrics with total_recommendations, high_priority_actions, potential_wealth_impact, probability_improvement

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All features working, minor modal UX issue)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing Wheeler family demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Financial Plan Generator and AI Meeting Summary Generator are the 2 killer features that make advisors switch platforms. Both are fully functional. Plan Generator creates comprehensive plans in seconds (normally takes 5-10 hours). Meeting Summary Generator creates summaries with action items instantly. Navigation includes Plan Generator and Meeting Notes under Clients section in Adviser Mode. Connected Accounts data is MOCKED.

mocked_apis_list: Connected Accounts data (Commonwealth Bank, Vanguard Super, CommSec)

sections: Executive Summary (headline, retirement_probability, years_to_retirement, projected_retirement_balance, safe_annual_income, key_finding, potential_improvement)
Investment Strategy (strategy_name, risk_profile, target_allocation, expected_return, recommendations)
Action Items (task, assigned_to, due_date, priority, status)
